description_long: This is a tall, narrow ceramic vase with a bulbous lower body and a gently flared rim. The surface is predominantly off-white, adorned with hand-painted blue, green, and brown floral motifs that wrap around the body. A single, robust handle with brown striping extends from the upper neck to the midsection, providing both decorative and functional value. The rim and base are accented with blue and green bands, adding to the visual interest. The vase shows some minor surface imperfections and wear, suggesting age or frequent use. Its overall form and decoration evoke a traditional, artisanal style suitable for display in public or semi-public urban spaces.
description: A tall, hand-painted ceramic vase with blue, green, and brown floral motifs and a single striped handle. The off-white body is accented with colored bands and shows minor wear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full handle with brown striping and minimal decoration on the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the handle and a partial view of the floral motif wrapping around the body.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the central floral motif and the vase's symmetrical, bulbous shape.
description_view_3: Side view with the handle visible and the floral motif extending around the body.
